# Work Packet ALB-017 — `bin/albion-vision`: Direct GLM-4.6V CLI (Both Lanes)

## 1. TASK

Build the vision front-end: a one-shot CLI that takes an image (plus optional prompt) and returns a text description from GLM-4.6V, speaking directly to Z.ai over HTTP on either auth lane. No MCP anywhere.

## 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME

- `bin/albion-vision` — the CLI.
- `bin/albion-doctor` — new `vision` check.
- `tests/test_vision.sh` — hermetic, stubbed-curl tests.

## 3. CONTEXT

- **Read first:** `docs/research/reports/11-glm-4.6v-plan-lane-probe.md` (the empirical ground truth — endpoint/format/error-code table; treat it as authoritative over Z.ai docs), `env/albion-env.sh` (lane + token-variable semantics — mirror them exactly), `tests/test_doctor.sh` (the `ALBION_CURL_RECORD`/scenario curl-stub pattern to reuse), `bin/albion-doctor` (`record_check` registry), `CONVENTIONS.md`.
- **CLI contract:** `albion-vision [--lane plan|api] [--model SLUG] [--prompt TEXT] <image-path>` → description text on stdout, exit 0. Defaults: lane from `ALBION_AUTH_LANE` (default `plan`), model `glm-4.6v`, prompt "Describe this image factually and completely."
- **Plan lane:** POST `https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic/v1/messages`, headers `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01`; Anthropic Messages body with an image content block (`{"type":"image","source":{"type":"base64","media_type":...,"data":...}}`). Token resolution identical to the env file's plan lane.
- **API lane:** POST `https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4/chat/completions`, OpenAI-style `image_url` content part with a base64 data URI. Token resolution identical to the env file's api lane.
- **Input constraints (report 11):** jpg/jpeg/png only; reject >5MB with a factual message. Base64 and JSON via python3 (no hand-rolled escaping).
- **Diagnostics (report 11's error table, verbatim semantics):**
  - `1113`/429 on the api lane with a plan-shaped failure → say: this token appears to be a Coding Plan token; plan tokens only work via `--lane plan` (/api/anthropic), or fund the account for the api lane.
  - `1211`/400 → unknown model slug; name the slug and suggest `glm-4.6v`.
  - Any other non-200 → factual one-line error with HTTP status and the response's error code/message. **The token value must never appear in any output, log, or error.**

## 4. MUST DO

- Zero dependencies beyond bash + curl + python3; portability per `CONVENTIONS.md` (BSD + GNU identical); symlink-safe self-location like the other bin/ tools.
- Doctor `vision` check: offline mode → PASS when `bin/albion-vision` exists+executable and the active lane's token variable is set (detail line naming lane and model; SKIP if the binary is missing); with `--live` → additionally run a 1×1 PNG probe through the CLI and PASS on non-empty description. Preserve check-registry shape and the summary-tally invariant (`tests/test_plugin_manifest.sh` asserts tally == PASS lines — your new check must keep every existing test green; if any test outside your scope breaks, STOP and report it in your final message instead of editing it).
- `tests/test_vision.sh`, wired into `bash tests/run.sh`, using a curl stub: correct endpoint/headers/body shape per lane (assert the recorded request, including that the anthropic-version header is present on plan lane and absent on api lane); model and prompt overrides reach the payload; 1113 and 1211 map to their specific diagnostics; missing file, unsupported extension, and oversize file fail cleanly; stdout of a successful call is exactly the description text; **no output path ever contains the stub token**.
- Run the full suite yourself before finishing.

## 5. MUST NOT DO

- No MCP server, npx, node, or second-credential support of any kind.
- Do NOT touch `bin/albion`, `bin/albion-compile`, hooks, `plugin/` content, `manifest/`, or `env/albion-env.sh`.
- Do NOT make live network calls in tests.
- Do NOT modify anything outside the three paths in EXPECTED OUTCOME. If an out-of-scope test breaks, STOP and report.
- Do NOT run git state-changing commands.

## 6. TOOLS ALLOWED

File creation/editing and shell execution within the repository workspace only.

## 7. SUCCESS CRITERIA

- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` fully green including `test_vision.sh`.
- [ ] Stubbed plan-lane and api-lane calls produce correctly-shaped requests; diagnostics match report 11's error table.
- [ ] `bin/albion-doctor --offline` shows a `vision` line and the tally invariant holds.
- [ ] CI-equivalent shellcheck clean; `git status` shows only the three allowed paths.
